prompt: Enable Screen Time Downtime. System Settings > Screen Time > Downtime > 'Turn On' and set a schedule. Fast path: `cerebellum 'settings open com.apple.preference.screentime'`. Screen Time state is sandboxed under com.apple.ScreenTimeAgent and not freely readable; the eval soft-passes if the Screen Time pane was opened (process running) and there's a recent change to ScreenTimeAgent prefs.
